name: Hawaiian Flours Zucchini/Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Water and juice from cans
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the zucchini and tomatoes.
2. Drain the juices from the canned corn, tomatoes, and diced zucchini and reserve them to use as part of the liquid in the recipe.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
4. Pour into a bread machine pan and bake according to your machine's instructions.
